# origimoss Inc. (株式会社origimoss)

> origimoss Inc. (formerly moss muss / Green's Green Holdings) is a Japanese venture company that industrializes moss and provides soil-free greening solutions. Its flagship product is the Sunagoke Moss Sheet — a lightweight, soil-free, moss-based greening material that suppresses weeds while greening surfaces. It is registered in Japan's MLIT NETIS system (NETIS Registration Number: HR-180001-A).

## Key facts
- Company: origimoss Inc. (株式会社origimoss), formerly moss muss / Green's Green Holdings
- Representative Director: Yoichi Takebayashi
- Established: September 2024
- Location: Tokyo, Japan
- Capital: JPY 3,000,000
- Business: agriculture, agricultural consulting, agricultural technology development (primarily B2B; 20+ cultivation fields nationwide)
- Flagship product: Sunagoke Moss Sheet (スナゴケシート), NETIS Registration Number HR-180001-A

## Product: Sunagoke Moss Sheet (スナゴケシート)
- A soil-free, lightweight moss greening material grown on top of a weed-control sheet, achieving weed suppression and greening at the same time.
- Why no soil is needed: moss has no true roots (only rhizoids); it absorbs water and nutrients directly through its surface and grows on rainfall and morning dew, so it needs no soil and little maintenance.
- Benefits: weed suppression, CO₂ fixation, soil-free and lightweight, reduced maintenance.
- Use cases: rooftop greening, outdoor greening (minimal-maintenance and managed types), indoor greening, and landscaping; supports greening obligations under Japan's Urban Green Space Act and Factory Location Act.
